Defendant Rinersons Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Oct-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
David Dyer, (415) 988-1982, Plaintiff in Pro Per. (via ZOOM)
Darrell Rinerson, (408) 858-7033, DRinerson@Rinerson.com, Defendant in Pro Per

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DARRELL RINERSON'S Motion To Set Aside Default is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

*After hearing, an order GRANTING Defendant's CCP 473 motion to set aside default is signed.
